extraction.one_line_summary: VON DER POEL Mathieu won the uphill sprint after Caleb Ewan crashed from wheel contact with Girmay in final 100m while positioned third wheel.
tactical_patterns: Alpecin-Fenix controlled final kilometers solo without train, suggesting confidence in van der Poel's raw power over positioning.
KEMNA attacked inside final 3km creating 10-second gap, forcing other teams to chase rather than organize sprints.
Final right-hand corner before climb caused massive crashes including Tratnik/van Hooydonck, revealing positioning chaos before uphill finish.

rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: positive: won without leadout train on 5.6km at 4% gradient, demonstrating superior uphill sprint power
rider_signals.GIRMAY Biniam: positive: finished second uphill without team support, holding position through chaotic finale as neo-pro
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: crashed from wheel contact while in third position, suggesting positioning error or bike handling issue uphill
rider_signals.KEMNA Lennard: positive: solo attack sub-3km gained 10 seconds, forcing peloton disruption despite being caught
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: positive: salvaged third and 4 bonus seconds from crash chaos, showing opportunistic positioning
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: neutral: survived uphill finish in lead group but showed no offensive capacity on gradient
